title: sssvcqr: Sparse-Smooth Spatially Varying Coefficient Quantile Regression
description: R package implementing sparse-smooth spatially varying coefficient quantile regression with graph-regularized ADMM estimation, spatially blocked cross-validation, prediction, plotting, diagnostics, and simulation helpers.

creators.name: Hou, Houjian
creators.affiliation: Center for Applied Statistics, School of Statistics, Renmin University of China
